fields.name: request_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this KYC refresh request, issued by risk_and_compliance

fields.name: request_timestamp
fields.description: Date and time when the KYC refresh request was created

fields.name: department_from
fields.description: Originating department that initiated the KYC refresh request

fields.name: department_to
fields.description: Destination department responsible for processing the KYC refresh request

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Processing priority level assigned to this request

fields.name: customer
fields.description: Core customer identity and contact information subject to KYC refresh

children.name: customer_id
children.description: Unique internal identifier for the customer

children.name: national_id
children.description: Customer's national identification number or passport identifier

fields.name: kyc_refresh_details
fields.description: Detailed information about the KYC refresh trigger, risk assessment, and compliance issues

children.name: last_refresh_date
children.description: Date of the customer's most recent KYC refresh

children.name: refresh_reason
children.description: Primary business reason triggering this KYC refresh cycle

children.name: risk_flag
children.description: Indicator whether the customer has been flagged for elevated risk

children.name: risk_level
children.description: Categorical assessment of the customer's current risk profile

children.name: trigger_factors
children.description: List of specific risk or compliance factors that prompted this refresh; array of strings

children.name: compliance_issues
children.description: Array of compliance checks or issues identified during risk assessment

children.name: issue_type
children.description: Category or classification of the compliance issue

children.name: status
children.description: Current processing status of the compliance issue

children.name: severity
children.description: Severity level assigned to the compliance issue

fields.name: required_documents
fields.description: List of document types the customer must submit to complete KYC refresh; array of strings

fields.name: required_actions
fields.description: List of specific actions the customer must complete to satisfy KYC refresh requirements; array of strings

fields.name: deadline
fields.description: Final date and time by which the customer must complete all required KYC refresh actions

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current state of the KYC refresh request workflow

fields.name: internal_notes
fields.description: Internal observations or recommendations from risk_and_compliance for the credit department
